spec.description: Pokémon overview dashboard powered by PokéAPI data – types, generations, stats and more!

options.content:
⚡

POKÉMON DASHBOARD

📡 Daten aus PokéAPI · pokeapi.co/api/v2 · Alle 9 Generationen · 1302 Pokémon

🔴⚪🟡
